# NX4C DSC CHINA — Project Overview

## Project Info
- **Path**: `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4\`
- **Type**: VB.NET .NET Framework 4.8 WinForms (industrial assembly line control)
- **DB**: REAR → SQL Server (`192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR`, DB: `NX4C`, sa/sns123.,), FRT → Local Access MDB per station

## Folder Structure
```
DSC CHINA NX4/
├── NX4C FRT/NX4C FRT/         # FRT (Front Back) projects
│   ├── JA01/                  # FRT JA01 station (FRT JA01.vbproj)
│   ├── JA02/                  # FRT JA02 station (FRT JA02.vbproj) — bug fixes applied
│   ├── JA03/                  # FRT JA03 station (FRT JA03.vbproj)
│   ├── JA04/                  # FRT JA04 station (FRT JA04.vbproj)
│   └── SERVER SEARCH/         # FRT history viewer (SERVEr Search.vbproj)
├── NX4C REAR/                 # REAR (Rear Back) projects
│   ├── RH_JA01/               # REAR RH JA01 (RH_JA01(201).vbproj)
│   ├── RH_JA02/               # REAR RH JA02 (RH_JA02(202).vbproj) — belt scan added
│   ├── RH_JA03/               # REAR RH JA03 (RH_JA03(203).vbproj) — damper skip added
│   ├── LH_JA01/               # REAR LH JA01 (LH_JA01(211).vbproj)
│   ├── LH_JA02/               # REAR LH JA02 (LH_JA02(212).vbproj) — belt scan added
│   ├── SERVER SEARCH/         # REAR history viewer (SERVEr Search.vbproj)
│   ├── PartEditor/            # Part Master editor standalone app (new)
│   ├── END TEST/              # End-of-line test (NI dependency — cannot build on this PC)
│   ├── KU VIP 2ND BACK/       # KU VIP variant (Mitsubishi PLC dependency)
│   └── ALTER_TablePart.sql    # DB schema update script
└── exe/                       # Distribution folder (all builds + guides)
```

## Assembly Naming Convention
- Pattern: `NX4C_[FRT|REAR]_[STATION](YYYYMMDD).exe`
- Examples: `NX4C_FRT_JA02(20260313).exe`, `NX4C_REAR_RH_JA02(20260313).exe`
- Set via `<AssemblyName>` in .vbproj

## Key Technical Details
- REAR uses ADODB Recordset (SQLOLEDB provider) for SQL Server
- FRT uses OleDb (Microsoft.Jet.OLEDB.4.0) for Access MDB
- Step-based state machine: `wStep` (Double type, supports 3.1, 4.1 etc.)
- Serial barcode scanner: `Serial_Scanner_DataReceived` handler
- Digital I/O: `DO_ON/DO_OFF/DO_WRITE` pattern for PLC signaling

## DB Schema (REAR SQL Server)
### TablePart (Part Master)
- PartNo, PartName, OptionPosition (LH/RH), OptionRemote (Boolean)
- **OptionBeltCode** (NVARCHAR 20) — belt barcode identification code (added 2026-03-13)
- **OptionDamper** (NVARCHAR 10) — USE/SKIP (added 2026-03-13)
- Seq, Model, UseYN

### TableMainRH / TableMainLH (Production History)
- LineSerial, JA01~JA03 DATE/START_TIME/END_TIME/DECISION
- JA02_TQ1, JA02_TQ2 (RH only)
- **JA02_BELT_BARCODE** (NVARCHAR 50) — scanned barcode value (added 2026-03-13)
- **JA02_BELT_DECISION** (NVARCHAR 10) — OK/NA (added 2026-03-13)

## Build Notes
- MSBuild required (.NET Framework 4.8 targeting)
- Cannot build on this PC: END TEST (NationalInstruments UI), KU VIP (Mitsubishi PLC COM)
- FlexCell Grid used in FrmPart.vb (legacy, not modified)

---

## Work Log

### 2026-03-13 (09:00 ~ 14:12)

**Modification requests (5 items):**

| # | Request | Solution | Status |
|---|---------|----------|--------|
| 1 | FRT JA02: OE barcode car type shows wrong value | Bug fix — `OPTJON_CARTYPE` typo → `OPTION_CARTYPE` | Done |
| 2 | FRT JA02: OE SAB/CSAB assembly should be skipped | Guide doc — set SAB=NONE in Part Master | Done |
| 3 | FRT JA02: Lumbar support not working for 4 parts | Guide doc — set L/SUPT in Part Master | Done |
| 4 | REAR JA02: Belt barcode identification needed | Code — belt scan verification in RH/LH JA02 | Done |
| 5 | REAR JA03: Damper assembly skip for certain parts | Code — OptionDamper=SKIP logic in RH_JA03 | Done |

**Additional bugs found & fixed (FRT JA02):**
- `OPTION_cSAB` was reading from wrong field (`OPTION_SAB`)
- `OPTION_VENT` was commented out (not loading)

**New features implemented:**
- REAR RH/LH JA02: Belt barcode scan UI (lblBeltHeader, srcBeltValue, srcBeltDec) + verification logic at wStep 3/3.1
- REAR RH/LH JA02: Belt scan data saved to DB (JA02_BELT_BARCODE, JA02_BELT_DECISION)
- REAR RH JA03: Damper skip logic at wStep 3 (OptionDamper=SKIP → skip torque check)
- REAR PartEditor: Standalone Part Master editor with DB Schema Update button
- SQL schema extension: OptionBeltCode, OptionDamper on TablePart; BELT columns on TableMainRH/LH

**Deliverables (exe folder):**
- 12 exe files (FRT 5 + REAR 7) — all .NET Framework 4.8
- 3 guide documents (전체/FRT/REAR)
- 1 SQL script (ALTER_TablePart.sql)
- 1 .NET Framework installer (ndp48)

1→Imports System
     2→Imports System.Data
     3→Imports System.Data.OleDb
     4→Imports System.Drawing
     5→Imports System.Windows.Forms
     6→
     7→Namespace PartEditor
     8→
     9→    ''' <summary>
    10→    ''' Main form for editing TablePart in NX4C SQL Server database.
    11→    ''' Uses OleDb with SQLOLEDB provider to match existing project pattern.
    12→    ''' </summary>
    13→    Public Class FrmMain
    14→
    15→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
    16→        ' Constants
    17→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
    18→        Private Const CONN_STRING As String =
    19→            "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR;" &
    20→            "Initial Catalog=NX4C;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"
    21→
    22→        Private Const COL_PART_NO As String = "PartNo"
    23→        Private Const COL_PART_NAME As String = "PartName"
    24→        Private Const COL_OPT_POSITION As String = "OptionPosition"
    25→        Private Const COL_OPT_REMOTE As String = "OptionRemote"
    26→        Private Const COL_OPT_BELT As String = "OptionBeltCode"
    27→        Private Const COL_OPT_DAMPER As String = "OptionDamper"
    28→        Private Const COL_SEQ As String = "Seq"
    29→        Private Const COL_MODEL As String = "Model"
    30→        Private Const COL_USE_YN As String = "UseYN"
    31→
    32→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
    33→        ' Fields
    34→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
    35→        Private _fullTable As DataTable        ' Master copy from DB
    36→        Private _filteredTable As DataTable    ' Filtered view bound to grid
    37→
    38→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
    39→        ' Initialization
    40→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
    41→        Public Sub New()
    42→            InitializeComponent()
    43→            SetupDataGridView()
    44→        End Sub
    45→
    46→        ''' <summary>
    47→        ''' Configure DataGridView columns. Must be called after InitializeComponent.
    48→        ''' Uses explicit column definitions so AutoGenerateColumns can be False,
    49→        ''' enabling ComboBoxColumn for OptionPosition, OptionDamper, UseYN.
    50→        ''' </summary>
    51→        Private Sub SetupDataGridView()
    52→            dgvPart.AutoGenerateColumns = False
    53→            dgvPart.Columns.Clear()
    54→
    55→            ' PartNo - text (primary key)
    56→            Dim colPartNo As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
    57→            colPartNo.Name = "colPartNo"
    58→            colPartNo.HeaderText = "PartNo"
    59→            colPartNo.DataPropertyName = COL_PART_NO
    60→            colPartNo.Width = 140
    61→            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colPartNo)
    62→
    63→            ' PartName - text
    64→            Dim colPartName As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
    65→            colPartName.Name = "colPartName"
    66→            colPartName.HeaderText = "PartName"
    67→            colPartName.DataPropertyName = COL_PART_NAME
    68→            colPartName.Width = 180
    69→            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colPartName)
    70→
    71→            ' OptionPosition - combobox LH/RH
    72→            Dim colPosition As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
    73→            colPosition.Name = "colOptionPosition"
    74→            colPosition.HeaderText = "Position"
    75→            colPosition.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_POSITION
    76→            colPosition.Items.AddRange("", "LH", "RH")
    77→            colPosition.Width = 80
    78→            colPosition.FlatStyle = FlatStyle.Flat
    79→            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colPosition)
    80→
    81→            ' OptionRemote - checkbox (BIT column)
    82→            Dim colRemote As New DataGridViewCheckBoxColumn()
    83→            colRemote.Name = "colOptionRemote"
    84→            colRemote.HeaderText = "Remote"
    85→            colRemote.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_REMOTE
    86→            colRemote.Width = 65
    87→            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colRemote)
    88→
    89→            ' OptionBeltCode - text
    90→            Dim colBelt As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
    91→            colBelt.Name = "colOptionBeltCode"
    92→            colBelt.HeaderText = "BeltCode"
    93→            colBelt.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_BELT
    94→            colBelt.Width = 100
    95→            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colBelt)
    96→
    97→            ' OptionDamper - combobox USE/SKIP
    98→            Dim colDamper As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
    99→            colDamper.Name = "colOptionDamper"
   100→            colDamper.HeaderText = "Damper"
   101→            colDamper.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_DAMPER
   102→            colDamper.Items.AddRange("", "USE", "SKIP")
   103→            colDamper.Width = 75
   104→            colDamper.FlatStyle = FlatStyle.Flat
   105→            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colDamper)
   106→
   107→            ' Seq - numeric
   108→            Dim colSeq As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
   109→            colSeq.Name = "colSeq"
   110→            colSeq.HeaderText = "Seq"
   111→            colSeq.DataPropertyName = COL_SEQ
   112→            colSeq.Width = 55
   113→            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colSeq)
   114→
   115→            ' Model - text
   116→            Dim colModel As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
   117→            colModel.Name = "colModel"
   118→            colModel.HeaderText = "Model"
   119→            colModel.DataPropertyName = COL_MODEL
   120→            colModel.Width = 130
   121→            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colModel)
   122→
   123→            ' UseYN - combobox Y/N
   124→            Dim colUseYN As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
   125→            colUseYN.Name = "colUseYN"
   126→            colUseYN.HeaderText = "UseYN"
   127→            colUseYN.DataPropertyName = COL_USE_YN
   128→            colUseYN.Items.AddRange("", "Y", "N")
   129→            colUseYN.Width = 65
   130→            colUseYN.FlatStyle = FlatStyle.Flat
   131→            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colUseYN)
   132→        End Sub
   133→
   134→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   135→        ' Data Load
   136→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   137→        ''' <summary>
   138→        ''' Load all rows from TablePart ordered by Seq, then PartNo.
   139→        ''' </summary>
   140→        Private Sub LoadData()
   141→            Try
   142→                Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
   143→                lblStatus.Text = "Loading..."
   144→                Application.DoEvents()
   145→
   146→                Using conn As New OleDbConnection(CONN_STRING)
   147→                    conn.Open()
   148→                    Dim sql As String =
   149→                        "SELECT PartNo, PartName, OptionPosition, OptionRemote, " &
   150→                        "OptionBeltCode, OptionDamper, Seq, Model, UseYN " &
   151→                        "FROM TablePart ORDER BY Seq, PartNo"
   152→
   153→                    Dim adapter As New OleDbDataAdapter(sql, conn)
   154→                    _fullTable = New DataTable()
   155→                    adapter.Fill(_fullTable)
   156→                End Using
   157→
   158→                ' Convert DBNull to empty string to prevent ComboBox DataError
   159→                NormalizeStringColumns()
   160→                ApplyFilter(txtSearch.Text.Trim())
   161→
   162→            Catch ex As Exception
   163→                lblStatus.Text = "Load failed: " & ex.Message
   164→                MessageBox.Show("Load error:" & Environment.NewLine & ex.Message,
   165→                                "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
   166→            Finally
   167→                Cursor = Cursors.Default
   168→            End Try
   169→        End Sub
   170→
   171→        ''' <summary>
   172→        ''' Replace DBNull with empty string for NVARCHAR columns used in ComboBoxColumn.
   173→        ''' Prevents "value is not valid" DataError on binding.
   174→        ''' Uses Convert.IsDBNull because Microsoft.VisualBasic.Information.IsDBNull
   175→        ''' is not in scope when Namespace wraps the class.
   176→        ''' </summary>
   177→        Private Sub NormalizeStringColumns()
   178→            If _fullTable Is Nothing Then Return
   179→            Dim stringCols() As String = {
   180→                COL_PART_NO, COL_PART_NAME, COL_OPT_POSITION,
   181→                COL_OPT_BELT, COL_OPT_DAMPER, COL_MODEL, COL_USE_YN
   182→            }
   183→            For Each row As DataRow In _fullTable.Rows
   184→                For Each colName As String In stringCols
   185→                    If _fullTable.Columns.Contains(colName) Then
   186→                        If Convert.IsDBNull(row(colName)) Then
   187→                            row(colName) = ""
   188→                        End If
   189→                    End If
   190→                Next
   191→            Next
   192→        End Sub
   193→
   194→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   195→        ' Filter
   196→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   197→        ''' <summary>
   198→        ''' Filter master table by PartNo substring and rebind grid.
   199→        ''' Empty keyword shows all rows from _fullTable directly.
   200→        ''' </summary>
   201→        Private Sub ApplyFilter(keyword As String)
   202→            If _fullTable Is Nothing Then Return
   203→
   204→            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(keyword) Then
   205→                dgvPart.DataSource = Nothing
   206→                dgvPart.DataSource = _fullTable
   207→                lblStatus.Text = "Total " & _fullTable.Rows.Count & " rows."
   208→            Else
   209→                _filteredTable = _fullTable.Clone()
   210→                For Each row As DataRow In _fullTable.Rows
   211→                    If row(COL_PART_NO).ToString().IndexOf(keyword,
   212→                            StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0 Then
   213→                        _filteredTable.ImportRow(row)
   214→                    End If
   215→                Next
   216→                dgvPart.DataSource = Nothing
   217→                dgvPart.DataSource = _filteredTable
   218→                lblStatus.Text = "Filtered " & _filteredTable.Rows.Count & " / " & _fullTable.Rows.Count & " rows."
   219→            End If
   220→        End Sub
   221→
   222→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   223→        ' Save
   224→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   225→        ''' <summary>
   226→        ''' Persist all pending changes to SQL Server.
   227→        ''' INSERT for Added, UPDATE for Modified, DELETE for Deleted rows.
   228→        ''' </summary>
   229→        Private Sub SaveData()
   230→            dgvPart.EndEdit()   ' Commit any active cell edit
   231→
   232→            ' Use whichever DataTable is currently displayed
   233→            Dim sourceTable As DataTable
   234→            If Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(txtSearch.Text.Trim()) AndAlso _filteredTable IsNot Nothing Then
   235→                sourceTable = _filteredTable
   236→            Else
   237→                sourceTable = _fullTable
   238→            End If
   239→
   240→            If sourceTable Is Nothing Then
   241→                lblStatus.Text = "No data loaded."
   242→                Return
   243→            End If
   244→
   245→            Try
   246→                Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
   247→                lblStatus.Text = "Saving..."
   248→                Application.DoEvents()
   249→
   250→                Dim savedCount As Integer = 0
   251→
   252→                Using conn As New OleDbConnection(CONN_STRING)
   253→                    conn.Open()
   254→                    For Each row As DataRow In sourceTable.Rows
   255→                        Select Case row.RowState
   256→                            Case DataRowState.Added
   257→                                ExecuteInsert(conn, row)
   258→                                savedCount += 1
   259→                            Case DataRowState.Modified
   260→                                ExecuteUpdate(conn, row)
   261→                                savedCount += 1
   262→                            Case DataRowState.Deleted
   263→                                ExecuteDelete(conn, row)
   264→                                savedCount += 1
   265→                            Case Else
   266→                                ' Unchanged — no action needed
   267→                        End Select
   268→                    Next
   269→                End Using
   270→
   271→                sourceTable.AcceptChanges()
   272→                lblStatus.Text = "Saved " & savedCount & " change(s) successfully."
   273→
   274→                If savedCount > 0 Then
   275→                    MessageBox.Show("Saved " & savedCount & " change(s).", "Save Complete",
   276→                                    MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
   277→                Else
   278→                    MessageBox.Show("No changes to save.", "Save",
   279→                                    MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
   280→                End If
   281→
   282→            Catch ex As Exception
   283→                lblStatus.Text = "Save failed: " & ex.Message
   284→                MessageBox.Show("Save error:" & Environment.NewLine & ex.Message,
   285→                                "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
   286→            Finally
   287→                Cursor = Cursors.Default
   288→            End Try
   289→        End Sub
   290→
   291→        Private Sub ExecuteInsert(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
   292→            Dim sql As String =
   293→                "INSERT INTO TablePart " &
   294→                "(PartNo, PartName, OptionPosition, OptionRemote, " &
   295→                "OptionBeltCode, OptionDamper, Seq, Model, UseYN) " &
   296→                "VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)"
   297→            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
   298→                AddAllParameters(cmd, row, useOriginal:=False)
   299→                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
   300→            End Using
   301→        End Sub

   303→        Private Sub ExecuteUpdate(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
   304→            Dim sql As String =
   305→                "UPDATE TablePart SET " &
   306→                "PartName=?, OptionPosition=?, OptionRemote=?, " &
   307→                "OptionBeltCode=?, OptionDamper=?, Seq=?, Model=?, UseYN=? " &
   308→                "WHERE PartNo=?"
   309→            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
   310→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartName", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NAME))
   311→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionPosition", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_POSITION))
   312→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionRemote", OleDbType.Boolean).Value = BoolSafe(row(COL_OPT_REMOTE))
   313→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionBeltCode", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_BELT))
   314→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionDamper", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_DAMPER))
   315→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@Seq", OleDbType.Integer).Value = IntSafe(row(COL_SEQ))
   316→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@Model", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_MODEL))
   317→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@UseYN", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_USE_YN))
   318→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO))
   319→                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
   320→            End Using
   321→        End Sub
   322→
   323→        Private Sub ExecuteDelete(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
   324→            Dim sql As String = "DELETE FROM TablePart WHERE PartNo=?"
   325→            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
   326→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value =
   327→                    NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO, DataRowVersion.Original))
   328→                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
   329→            End Using
   330→        End Sub
   331→
   332→        Private Sub AddAllParameters(cmd As OleDbCommand, row As DataRow, useOriginal As Boolean)
   333→            Dim ver As DataRowVersion = If(useOriginal, DataRowVersion.Original, DataRowVersion.Current)
   334→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO, ver))
   335→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartName", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NAME, ver))
   336→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionPosition", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_POSITION, ver))
   337→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionRemote", OleDbType.Boolean).Value = BoolSafe(row(COL_OPT_REMOTE, ver))
   338→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionBeltCode", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_BELT, ver))
   339→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionDamper", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_DAMPER, ver))
   340→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@Seq", OleDbType.Integer).Value = IntSafe(row(COL_SEQ, ver))
   341→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@Model", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_MODEL, ver))
   342→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@UseYN", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_USE_YN, ver))
   343→        End Sub
   344→
   345→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   346→        ' Value helpers
   347→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   348→        Private Function NullSafe(value As Object) As Object
   349→            If value Is Nothing OrElse Convert.IsDBNull(value) Then Return DBNull.Value
   350→            Return value
   351→        End Function
   352→
   353→        Private Function BoolSafe(value As Object) As Object
   354→            If value Is Nothing OrElse Convert.IsDBNull(value) Then Return False
   355→            If TypeOf value Is Boolean Then Return CType(value, Boolean)
   356→            Dim s As String = value.ToString().ToLower()
   357→            Return s = "1" OrElse s = "true"
   358→        End Function
   359→
   360→        Private Function IntSafe(value As Object) As Object
   361→            If value Is Nothing OrElse Convert.IsDBNull(value) Then Return 0
   362→            Dim result As Integer
   363→            If Integer.TryParse(value.ToString(), result) Then Return result
   364→            Return 0
   365→        End Function

   392→                If rowIdx >= 0 AndAlso rowIdx < dt.Rows.Count Then
   393→                    dt.Rows(rowIdx).Delete()
   394→                    lblStatus.Text = "Row [" & partNo & "] marked for deletion. Click Save to apply."
   395→                End If
   396→            End If
   397→        End Sub
   398→
   399→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   400→        ' Event handlers

   402→        Private Sub FrmMain_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

   449→        Private Sub RunSchemaUpdate(Optional silent As Boolean = False)
   450→            Try
   451→                Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
   452→                lblStatus.Text = "DB Schema updating..."
   453→                Application.DoEvents()
   454→
   455→                ' Use ADO.NET SqlClient for DDL statements (OleDb cannot run IF NOT EXISTS blocks)
   456→                Dim connStr As String =
   457→                    "Data Source=192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR;" &
   458→                    "Initial Catalog=NX4C;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"
   459→
   460→                Using conn As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection(connStr)
   461→                    conn.Open()
   462→
   463→                    ' Each ALTER must be executed separately
   464→                    Dim statements() As String = {
   465→                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'OptionBeltCode') " &
   466→                        "ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD OptionBeltCode NVARCHAR(20) DEFAULT ''",
   467→                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'OptionDamper') " &
   468→                        "ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD OptionDamper NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'USE'",
   469→                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'Seq') " &
   470→                        "ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD Seq INT NULL",
   471→                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'Model') " &
   472→                        "ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD Model NVARCHAR(50) DEFAULT ''",
   473→                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'UseYN') " &
   474→                        "ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD UseYN NVARCHAR(5) DEFAULT ''",
   475→                        "UPDATE TablePart SET OptionBeltCode = '702636' WHERE PartNo IN ('88410-N8610NNB', '88410-N8620NNB') AND (OptionBeltCode IS NULL OR OptionBeltCode = '')",
   476→                        "UPDATE TablePart SET OptionBeltCode = '705354' WHERE PartNo IN ('88310-N8610NNB', '88310-N8620NNB') AND (OptionBeltCode IS NULL OR OptionBeltCode = '')",
   477→                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainRH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_BARCODE') " &
   478→                        "ALTER TABLE TableMainRH ADD JA02_BELT_BARCODE NVARCHAR(50) DEFAULT ''",
   479→                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainRH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_DECISION') " &
   480→                        "ALTER TABLE TableMainRH ADD JA02_BELT_DECISION NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT ''",
   481→                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainLH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_BARCODE') " &
   482→                        "ALTER TABLE TableMainLH ADD JA02_BELT_BARCODE NVARCHAR(50) DEFAULT ''",
   483→                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainLH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_DECISION') " &
   484→                        "ALTER TABLE TableMainLH ADD JA02_BELT_DECISION NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT ''"
   485→                    }
   486→
   487→                    For Each sql As String In statements

   489→                            cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()

   500→                        "  - TableMainRH: JA02_BELT_BARCODE, JA02_BELT_DECISION" & Environment.NewLine &
   501→                        "  - TableMainLH: JA02_BELT_BARCODE, JA02_BELT_DECISION",
   502→                        "완료", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)

Imports System
Imports System.Data
Imports System.Data.OleDb
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Windows.Forms

Namespace PartEditor

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Main form for editing TablePart in NX4C SQL Server database.
    ''' Uses OleDb with SQLOLEDB provider to match existing project pattern.
    ''' </summary>
    Public Class FrmMain

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Constants
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Private Const CONN_STRING As String =
            "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR;" &
            "Initial Catalog=NX4C;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

        Private Const COL_PART_NO As String = "PartNo"
        Private Const COL_PART_NAME As String = "PartName"
        Private Const COL_OPT_POSITION As String = "OptionPosition"
        Private Const COL_OPT_REMOTE As String = "OptionRemote"
        Private Const COL_OPT_BELT As String = "OptionBeltCode"
        Private Const COL_OPT_DAMPER As String = "OptionDamper"
        Private Const COL_SEQ As String = "Seq"
        Private Const COL_MODEL As String = "Model"
        Private Const COL_USE_YN As String = "UseYN"

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Fields
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Private _fullTable As DataTable        ' Master copy from DB
        Private _filteredTable As DataTable    ' Filtered view bound to grid

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Initialization
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Public Sub New()
            InitializeComponent()
            SetupDataGridView()
        End Sub

        ''' <summary>
        ''' Configure DataGridView columns. Must be called after InitializeComponent.
        ''' Uses explicit column definitions so AutoGenerateColumns can be False,
        ''' enabling ComboBoxColumn for OptionPosition, OptionDamper, UseYN.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub SetupDataGridView()
            dgvPart.AutoGenerateColumns = False
            dgvPart.Columns.Clear()

            ' PartNo - text (primary key)
            Dim colPartNo As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colPartNo.Name = "colPartNo"
            colPartNo.HeaderText = "PartNo"
            colPartNo.DataPropertyName = COL_PART_NO
            colPartNo.Width = 140
            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colPartNo)

            ' PartName - text
            Dim colPartName As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colPartName.Name = "colPartName"
            colPartName.HeaderText = "PartName"
            colPartName.DataPropertyName = COL_PART_NAME
            colPartName.Width = 180
            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colPartName)

            ' OptionPosition - combobox LH/RH
            Dim colPosition As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
            colPosition.Name = "colOptionPosition"
            colPosition.HeaderText = "Position"
            colPosition.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_POSITION
            colPosition.Items.AddRange("", "LH", "RH")
            colPosition.Width = 80
            colPosition.FlatStyle = FlatStyle.Flat
            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colPosition)

            ' OptionRemote - checkbox (BIT column)
            Dim colRemote As New DataGridViewCheckBoxColumn()
            colRemote.Name = "colOptionRemote"
            colRemote.HeaderText = "Remote"
            colRemote.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_REMOTE
            colRemote.Width = 65
            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colRemote)

            ' OptionBeltCode - text
            Dim colBelt As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colBelt.Name = "colOptionBeltCode"
            colBelt.HeaderText = "BeltCode"
            colBelt.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_BELT
            colBelt.Width = 100
            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colBelt)

            ' OptionDamper - combobox USE/SKIP
            Dim colDamper As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
            colDamper.Name = "colOptionDamper"
            colDamper.HeaderText = "Damper"
            colDamper.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_DAMPER
            colDamper.Items.AddRange("", "USE", "SKIP")
            colDamper.Width = 75
            colDamper.FlatStyle = FlatStyle.Flat
            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colDamper)

            ' Seq - numeric
            Dim colSeq As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colSeq.Name = "colSeq"
            colSeq.HeaderText = "Seq"
            colSeq.DataPropertyName = COL_SEQ
            colSeq.Width = 55
            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colSeq)

            ' Model - text
            Dim colModel As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colModel.Name = "colModel"
            colModel.HeaderText = "Model"
            colModel.DataPropertyName = COL_MODEL
            colModel.Width = 130
            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colModel)

            ' UseYN - combobox Y/N
            Dim colUseYN As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
            colUseYN.Name = "colUseYN"
            colUseYN.HeaderText = "UseYN"
            colUseYN.DataPropertyName = COL_USE_YN
            colUseYN.Items.AddRange("", "Y", "N")
            colUseYN.Width = 65
            colUseYN.FlatStyle = FlatStyle.Flat
            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colUseYN)
        End Sub

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Data Load
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ''' <summary>
        ''' Load all rows from TablePart ordered by Seq, then PartNo.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub LoadData()
            Try
                Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
                lblStatus.Text = "Loading..."
                Application.DoEvents()

                Using conn As New OleDbConnection(CONN_STRING)
                    conn.Open()
                    Dim sql As String =
                        "SELECT PartNo, PartName, OptionPosition, OptionRemote, " &
                        "OptionBeltCode, OptionDamper, Seq, Model, UseYN " &
                        "FROM TablePart ORDER BY Seq, PartNo"

                    Dim adapter As New OleDbDataAdapter(sql, conn)
                    _fullTable = New DataTable()
                    adapter.Fill(_fullTable)
                End Using

                ' Convert DBNull to empty string to prevent ComboBox DataError
                NormalizeStringColumns()
                ApplyFilter(txtSearch.Text.Trim())

            Catch ex As Exception
                lblStatus.Text = "Load failed: " & ex.Message
                MessageBox.Show("Load error:" & Environment.NewLine & ex.Message,
                                "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Finally
                Cursor = Cursors.Default
            End Try
        End Sub

        ''' <summary>
        ''' Replace DBNull with empty string for NVARCHAR columns used in ComboBoxColumn.
        ''' Prevents "value is not valid" DataError on binding.
        ''' Uses Convert.IsDBNull because Microsoft.VisualBasic.Information.IsDBNull
        ''' is not in scope when Namespace wraps the class.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub NormalizeStringColumns()
            If _fullTable Is Nothing Then Return
            Dim stringCols() As String = {
                COL_PART_NO, COL_PART_NAME, COL_OPT_POSITION,
                COL_OPT_BELT, COL_OPT_DAMPER, COL_MODEL, COL_USE_YN
            }
            For Each row As DataRow In _fullTable.Rows
                For Each colName As String In stringCols
                    If _fullTable.Columns.Contains(colName) Then
                        If Convert.IsDBNull(row(colName)) Then
                            row(colName) = ""
                        End If
                    End If
                Next
            Next
        End Sub

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Filter
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ''' <summary>
        ''' Filter master table by PartNo substring and rebind grid.
        ''' Empty keyword shows all rows from _fullTable directly.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub ApplyFilter(keyword As String)
            If _fullTable Is Nothing Then Return

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(keyword) Then
                dgvPart.DataSource = Nothing
                dgvPart.DataSource = _fullTable
                lblStatus.Text = "Total " & _fullTable.Rows.Count & " rows."
            Else
                _filteredTable = _fullTable.Clone()
                For Each row As DataRow In _fullTable.Rows
                    If row(COL_PART_NO).ToString().IndexOf(keyword,
                            StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0 Then
                        _filteredTable.ImportRow(row)
                    End If
                Next
                dgvPart.DataSource = Nothing
                dgvPart.DataSource = _filteredTable
                lblStatus.Text = "Filtered " & _filteredTable.Rows.Count & " / " & _fullTable.Rows.Count & " rows."
            End If
        End Sub

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Save
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ''' <summary>
        ''' Persist all pending changes to SQL Server.
        ''' INSERT for Added, UPDATE for Modified, DELETE for Deleted rows.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub SaveData()
            dgvPart.EndEdit()   ' Commit any active cell edit

            ' Use whichever DataTable is currently displayed
            Dim sourceTable As DataTable
            If Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(txtSearch.Text.Trim()) AndAlso _filteredTable IsNot Nothing Then
                sourceTable = _filteredTable
            Else
                sourceTable = _fullTable
            End If

            If sourceTable Is Nothing Then
                lblStatus.Text = "No data loaded."
                Return
            End If

            Try
                Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
                lblStatus.Text = "Saving..."
                Application.DoEvents()

                Dim savedCount As Integer = 0

                Using conn As New OleDbConnection(CONN_STRING)
                    conn.Open()
                    For Each row As DataRow In sourceTable.Rows
                        Select Case row.RowState
                            Case DataRowState.Added
                                ExecuteInsert(conn, row)
                                savedCount += 1
                            Case DataRowState.Modified
                                ExecuteUpdate(conn, row)
                                savedCount += 1
                            Case DataRowState.Deleted
                                ExecuteDelete(conn, row)
                                savedCount += 1
                            Case Else
                                ' Unchanged — no action needed
                        End Select
                    Next
                End Using

                sourceTable.AcceptChanges()
                lblStatus.Text = "Saved " & savedCount & " change(s) successfully."

                If savedCount > 0 Then
                    MessageBox.Show("Saved " & savedCount & " change(s).", "Save Complete",
                                    MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
                Else
                    MessageBox.Show("No changes to save.", "Save",
                                    MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
                End If

            Catch ex As Exception
                lblStatus.Text = "Save failed: " & ex.Message
                MessageBox.Show("Save error:" & Environment.NewLine & ex.Message,
                                "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Finally
                Cursor = Cursors.Default
            End Try
        End Sub

        Private Sub ExecuteInsert(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
            Dim sql As String =
                "INSERT INTO TablePart " &
                "(PartNo, PartName, OptionPosition, OptionRemote, " &
                "OptionBeltCode, OptionDamper, Seq, Model, UseYN) " &
                "VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)"
            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
                AddAllParameters(cmd, row, useOriginal:=False)
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using
        End Sub

        Private Sub ExecuteUpdate(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
            Dim sql As String =
                "UPDATE TablePart SET " &
                "PartName=?, OptionPosition=?, OptionRemote=?, " &
                "OptionBeltCode=?, OptionDamper=?, Seq=?, Model=?, UseYN=? " &
                "WHERE PartNo=?"
            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartName", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NAME))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionPosition", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_POSITION))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionRemote", OleDbType.Boolean).Value = BoolSafe(row(COL_OPT_REMOTE))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionBeltCode", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_BELT))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionDamper", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_DAMPER))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@Seq", OleDbType.Integer).Value = IntSafe(row(COL_SEQ))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@Model", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_MODEL))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@UseYN", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_USE_YN))
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO))
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using
        End Sub

        Private Sub ExecuteDelete(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
            Dim sql As String = "DELETE FROM TablePart WHERE PartNo=?"
            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value =
                    NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO, DataRowVersion.Original))
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using
        End Sub

        Private Sub AddAllParameters(cmd As OleDbCommand, row As DataRow, useOriginal As Boolean)
            Dim ver As DataRowVersion = If(useOriginal, DataRowVersion.Original, DataRowVersion.Current)
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartName", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NAME, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionPosition", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_POSITION, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionRemote", OleDbType.Boolean).Value = BoolSafe(row(COL_OPT_REMOTE, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionBeltCode", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_BELT, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionDamper", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_DAMPER, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@Seq", OleDbType.Integer).Value = IntSafe(row(COL_SEQ, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@Model", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_MODEL, ver))
            cmd.Parameters.Add("@UseYN", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_USE_YN, ver))
        End Sub

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Value helpers
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Private Function NullSafe(value As Object) As Object
            If value Is Nothing OrElse Convert.IsDBNull(value) Then Return DBNull.Value
            Return value
        End Function

        Private Function BoolSafe(value As Object) As Object
            If value Is Nothing OrElse Convert.IsDBNull(value) Then Return False
            If TypeOf value Is Boolean Then Return CType(value, Boolean)
            Dim s As String = value.ToString().ToLower()
            Return s = "1" OrElse s = "true"
        End Function

        Private Function IntSafe(value As Object) As Object
            If value Is Nothing OrElse Convert.IsDBNull(value) Then Return 0
            Dim result As Integer
            If Integer.TryParse(value.ToString(), result) Then Return result
            Return 0
        End Function

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Delete row
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ''' <summary>
        ''' Mark the selected row as Deleted in the DataTable.
        ''' Actual DB delete is executed on Save.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub DeleteSelectedRow()
            If dgvPart.SelectedRows.Count = 0 Then
                lblStatus.Text = "Select a row to delete."
                Return
            End If

            Dim partNo As String = ""
            Dim cellVal As Object = dgvPart.SelectedRows(0).Cells("colPartNo").Value
            If cellVal IsNot Nothing Then partNo = cellVal.ToString()

            Dim dlgResult As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show(
                "Delete row [" & partNo & "]? Changes will apply after Save.",
                "Confirm Delete", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            If dlgResult <> DialogResult.Yes Then Return

            Dim dt As DataTable = TryCast(dgvPart.DataSource, DataTable)
            If dt IsNot Nothing Then
                Dim rowIdx As Integer = dgvPart.SelectedRows(0).Index
                If rowIdx >= 0 AndAlso rowIdx < dt.Rows.Count Then
                    dt.Rows(rowIdx).Delete()
                    lblStatus.Text = "Row [" & partNo & "] marked for deletion. Click Save to apply."
                End If
            End If
        End Sub

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' Event handlers
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Private Sub FrmMain_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
            ' 시작 시 누락 컬럼 자동 추가 (IF NOT EXISTS로 안전)
            RunSchemaUpdate(silent:=True)
            LoadData()
        End Sub

        Private Sub BtnLoad_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLoad.Click
            LoadData()
        End Sub

        Private Sub BtnSave_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnSave.Click
            SaveData()
        End Sub

        Private Sub BtnDelete_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnDelete.Click
            DeleteSelectedRow()
        End Sub

        Private Sub TxtSearch_TextChanged(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles txtSearch.TextChanged
            ApplyFilter(txtSearch.Text.Trim())
        End Sub

        ''' <summary>
        ''' Suppress DataError for ComboBox columns when cell value is empty string.
        ''' Empty string is included in Items list but DataGridView still raises DataError
        ''' during initial binding — silencing it prevents visible exception dialogs.
        ''' </summary>
        Private Sub DgvPart_DataError(sender As Object, e As DataGridViewDataErrorEventArgs) _
                Handles dgvPart.DataError
            e.ThrowException = False
        End Sub

        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        ' DB Schema Update
        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Private Sub BtnDbUpdate_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnDbUpdate.Click
            Dim dlgResult As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show(
                "DB 스키마를 업데이트합니다." & Environment.NewLine &
                "(안전대 식별, 댐퍼 skip, 스캔 이력 저장용 컬럼 추가)" & Environment.NewLine & Environment.NewLine &
                "이미 실행한 적이 있어도 다시 실행해도 안전합니다." & Environment.NewLine &
                "진행하시겠습니까?",
                "DB Schema Update", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Question)
            If dlgResult <> DialogResult.Yes Then Return

            RunSchemaUpdate()
        End Sub

        Private Sub RunSchemaUpdate(Optional silent As Boolean = False)
            Try
                Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
                lblStatus.Text = "DB Schema updating..."
                Application.DoEvents()

                ' Use ADO.NET SqlClient for DDL statements (OleDb cannot run IF NOT EXISTS blocks)
                Dim connStr As String =
                    "Data Source=192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR;" &
                    "Initial Catalog=NX4C;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

                Using conn As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection(connStr)
                    conn.Open()

                    ' Each ALTER must be executed separately
                    Dim statements() As String = {
                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'OptionBeltCode') " &
                        "ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD OptionBeltCode NVARCHAR(20) DEFAULT ''",
                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'OptionDamper') " &
                        "ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD OptionDamper NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'USE'",
                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'Seq') " &
                        "ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD Seq INT NULL",
                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'Model') " &
                        "ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD Model NVARCHAR(50) DEFAULT ''",
                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'UseYN') " &
                        "ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD UseYN NVARCHAR(5) DEFAULT ''",
                        "UPDATE TablePart SET OptionBeltCode = '702636' WHERE PartNo IN ('88410-N8610NNB', '88410-N8620NNB') AND (OptionBeltCode IS NULL OR OptionBeltCode = '')",
                        "UPDATE TablePart SET OptionBeltCode = '705354' WHERE PartNo IN ('88310-N8610NNB', '88310-N8620NNB') AND (OptionBeltCode IS NULL OR OptionBeltCode = '')",
                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainRH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_BARCODE') " &
                        "ALTER TABLE TableMainRH ADD JA02_BELT_BARCODE NVARCHAR(50) DEFAULT ''",
                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainRH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_DECISION') " &
                        "ALTER TABLE TableMainRH ADD JA02_BELT_DECISION NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT ''",
                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainLH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_BARCODE') " &
                        "ALTER TABLE TableMainLH ADD JA02_BELT_BARCODE NVARCHAR(50) DEFAULT ''",
                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainLH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_DECISION') " &
                        "ALTER TABLE TableMainLH ADD JA02_BELT_DECISION NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT ''"
                    }

                    For Each sql As String In statements
                        Using cmd As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlCommand(sql, conn)
                            cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
                        End Using
                    Next
                End Using

                lblStatus.Text = "DB Schema update complete."
                If Not silent Then
                    MessageBox.Show(
                        "DB 스키마 업데이트가 완료되었습니다." & Environment.NewLine & Environment.NewLine &
                        "추가된 항목:" & Environment.NewLine &
                        "  - TablePart: OptionBeltCode, OptionDamper, Seq, Model, UseYN" & Environment.NewLine &
                        "  - TableMainRH: JA02_BELT_BARCODE, JA02_BELT_DECISION" & Environment.NewLine &
                        "  - TableMainLH: JA02_BELT_BARCODE, JA02_BELT_DECISION",
                        "완료", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
                    ' 버튼 클릭 시만 데이터 리로드
                    LoadData()
                End If

            Catch ex As Exception
                lblStatus.Text = "DB Schema update failed: " & ex.Message
                If Not silent Then
                    MessageBox.Show(
                        "DB 스키마 업데이트 실패:" & Environment.NewLine & ex.Message & Environment.NewLine & Environment.NewLine &
                        "서버 연결을 확인해 주세요." & Environment.NewLine &
                        "문제가 지속되면 FTECH 담당자에게 문의해 주세요.",
                        "오류", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
                End If
            Finally
                Cursor = Cursors.Default
            End Try
        End Sub

    End Class

End Namespace

문제 확인했습니다. DataGridView에 다크 배경(`30,30,30`)을 설정했지만, **셀 글자색(ForeColor)을 지정하지 않아서 기본 검정색 텍스트**가 어두운 배경에 묻혀 안 보이는 문제입니다.

헤더(`ColumnHeadersDefaultCellStyle`, `RowHeadersDefaultCellStyle`)도 Font만 설정하고 색상이 빠져있고, 데이터 셀의 `DefaultCellStyle` 자체가 없습니다.

수정하겠습니다.

content.text:
스크린샷 확인했습니다. 문제가 명확합니다:

1. **그리드 배경이 흰색** — 다크 테마가 적용 안 됨
2. **대부분의 행에서 텍스트가 안 보임** — 흰 배경에 흰 글자이거나, 글자색이 설정 안 됨
3. 첫 번째 행만 데이터가 보이고 나머지는 체크박스/콤보만 보임

`DefaultCellStyle`에 배경색과 글자색이 아예 없어서 시스템 기본(흰 배경 + 검정 글자)으로 뜨는데, 데이터가 있는 셀은 글자가 흰색으로 렌더링되어 안 보이는 것입니다. Designer.vb에 셀 스타일을 제대로 추가하겠습니다.
